race.comment: THE CATCH (1) did a great job to score by 2.5 lengths over this course and distance last start to maintain his good form of late. Perfectly placed and is sure to take a ton of beating. MOET AT MIDNIGHT (10) settled well back last time out then found the line strongly to finish 2.25 lengths away in fifth over 1350m at Ipswich. Was outdashed but got going late and looks suited by the extra ground. Solid each-way hope. HURRICANE ROSIE (7) finished fifth last time out over 2150m at Ipswich, beaten 2 lengths. Serious threat. CARNEGIE HILL (3) finished out of the money when fresh from a spell two starts back then was seventh in a 1350m contest at Ipswich three-and-a-half weeks ago. Has the ability to produce a better result.
